title: Limoncello Cups and Tray Set
description:
Six small ceramic cups on a round tray with a ruffled edge — made for serving limoncello after dinner, which is how we end most meals on the Amalfi Coast. The set comes in two colour versions: one with a green sponged tray and cups, and one with a white and yellow tray and cups. Both feature hand-painted lemons with green leaves.

The tray has a scalloped, wavy rim and two small handles for carrying. The cups are sized just right for a cold shot of limoncello — small enough to hold comfortably between two fingers. In the green version, big lemons fill the centre of the tray and each cup is painted with lemons on a green background. In the yellow version, the palette is lighter with lemons on white and a yellow ruffled edge.

The limoncello bottle shown in the photos is not included — just the ceramic set. But we can tell you that once you pour cold limoncello into these little cups and pass them around after a meal, it feels like a proper Amalfi Coast evening. The cups keep the drink cool for a few extra moments thanks to the thick ceramic walls.

Each piece is handmade and hand-painted by artisans in Vietri sul Mare. The set belongs to our Praiano Collection. Because everything is done by hand, expect slight variations in the painting — that's the mark of the maker.
excerpt: Six ceramic limoncello cups on a handpainted tray with lemon decor. Limoncello not included. Handmade in Vietri sul Mare.
seoTitle: Limoncello Cup & Tray Set — Ceramiche Da Mario
seoDescription: Set of six handmade ceramic limoncello cups on a painted tray with lemon decor. Made in Vietri sul Mare. From Ceramiche Da Mario, Praiano.
